titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding the Circumambulation of the Uncircumcised
Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding the Circumambulation of the Uncircumcised

segments: أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «لاَ بَأْسَ بِأَنْ تَطُوفَ اَلْمَرْأَةُ غَيْرَ مَخْفُوضَةٍ فَأَمَّا اَلرَّجُلُ فَلاَ يَطُوفُ إِلاَّ مَخْتُوناً ».
arabic.text: أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «لاَ بَأْسَ بِأَنْ تَطُوفَ اَلْمَرْأَةُ غَيْرَ مَخْفُوضَةٍ فَأَمَّا اَلرَّجُلُ فَلاَ يَطُوفُ إِلاَّ مَخْتُوناً ».

segments:
Hadith.2814 - Hariz and Ibrahim ibn Umar narrated that Abu Abdullah (as) said:
"There is no harm if a woman performs tawaf without being circumcised. As for a man, he should not perform tawaf unless he is circumcised."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2814 - Hariz and Ibrahim ibn Umar narrated that Abu Abdullah (as) said:
"There is no harm if a woman performs tawaf without being circumcised. As for a man, he should not perform tawaf unless he is circumcised."

narratorChain.raw: 2814 - رَوَى حَرِيزٌ وَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ عُمَرَ قَالاَ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding the Circumambulation of the Uncircumcised

segments: اَلرَّجُلِ اَلَّذِي يُسْلِمُ فَيُرِيدُ أَنْ يَخْتَتِنَ وَ قَدْ حَضَرَ اَلْحَجُّ أَ يَحُجُّ أَوْ يَخْتَتِنُ قَالَ «لاَ يَحُجُّ حَتَّى يَخْتَتِنَ ».
arabic.text: اَلرَّجُلِ اَلَّذِي يُسْلِمُ فَيُرِيدُ أَنْ يَخْتَتِنَ وَ قَدْ حَضَرَ اَلْحَجُّ أَ يَحُجُّ أَوْ يَخْتَتِنُ قَالَ «لاَ يَحُجُّ حَتَّى يَخْتَتِنَ ».

segments:
Hadith.2815 - Ibn Maskan narrated from Ibrahim ibn Maymun, who reported from Imam Abu Abdullah (as) regarding a man who converts to Islam and intends to undergo circumcision while the time for Hajj has arrived.
He asked: Should he perform Hajj or undergo circumcision?
Imam (as) replied: "He should not perform Hajj until he is circumcised."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2815 - Ibn Maskan narrated from Ibrahim ibn Maymun, who reported from Imam Abu Abdullah (as) regarding a man who converts to Islam and intends to undergo circumcision while the time for Hajj has arrived.
He asked: Should he perform Hajj or undergo circumcision?
Imam (as) replied: "He should not perform Hajj until he is circumcised."

narratorChain.raw: 2815 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ مُسْكَانَ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ مَيْمُونٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي
